landmarks.name: KSR Bengaluru City Railway Station
landmarks.description: Krantivira Sangolli Rayanna Station — Bengaluru's main railway terminus connecting city, suburban and long-distance trains.

landmarks.name: MG Road
landmarks.description: Mahatma Gandhi Road — prime commercial corridor with offices, retail, restaurants, and the MG Road Namma Metro station.

landmarks.name: Electronic City
landmarks.description: India's largest IT hub housing Infosys, Wipro, TCS and 200+ tech companies across Phases 1 and 2.

landmarks.name: Whitefield Business District
landmarks.description: East Bengaluru's major IT corridor with ITPL, EPIP Zone, and multinational tech campuses.

landmarks.name: Koramangala
landmarks.description: Bengaluru's startup capital and premium residential-commercial zone, home to Flipkart, Swiggy and hundreds of startups.

landmarks.name: Indiranagar
landmarks.description: Upscale neighbourhood with 100 Feet Road, vibrant cafes, pubs, boutiques and the Indiranagar Namma Metro station.

landmarks.name: Lalbagh Botanical Garden
landmarks.description: 240-acre botanical garden established in 1760, featuring a glass house, lake, rare tropical plants and jogging tracks.

landmarks.name: Vidhana Soudha
landmarks.description: Seat of Karnataka state legislature — a stunning neoDravidian granite structure and iconic Bengaluru landmark.

landmarks.name: Kempegowda International Airport
landmarks.description: BLR International Airport — South India's busiest airport with 2 terminals, 65+ airlines, and the Namma Metro Airport line.

landmarks.name: IISc Campus
landmarks.description: Indian Institute of Science — premier research university campus spanning 371 acres in Malleswaram.

landmarks.name: Manipal Hospital Old Airport Road
landmarks.description: 350-bed multi-specialty hospital on Old Airport Road, offering advanced cardiac, neuro and orthopaedic care.

landmarks.name: UB City Mall
landmarks.description: Bengaluru's first luxury mall by UB Group, featuring premium brands, fine dining, and corporate towers.

landmarks.name: Cubbon Park
landmarks.description: 300-acre statutory park in the heart of the city, with shaded jogging paths, cycling tracks, and colonial-era buildings.

landmarks.name: Hebbal Interchange
landmarks.description: Major road interchange and upcoming Namma Metro Phase 2 hub connecting North Bengaluru to the airport corridor.

landmarks.name: Marathahalli Bridge
landmarks.description: Key road junction in East Bengaluru connecting Outer Ring Road tech corridors to Whitefield and Sarjapur Road.
